<!--
  感谢提交 PR!请填写以下内容。Thanks for the PR! Please fill this in.
  标题建议用 Conventional Commits,如 feat(pipeline): ...
  Title should follow Conventional Commits, e.g. feat(pipeline): ...
-->

## 这个 PR 做了什么 / What does this PR do?

<!-- 简述变更与动机 / Briefly describe the change and motivation -->

## 关联 Issue / Related issue

<!-- 例如 / e.g. Closes #123 -->

## 变更类型 / Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 📝 文档 / Docs
- [ ] ♻️ 重构 / Refactor
- [ ] ⚙️ 构建 / CI / Build / CI
- [ ] 💥 破坏性变更 / Breaking change

## 自检清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 本地通过 `go vet ./...` / `go build ./...` / `go test ./...`
- [ ] `gofmt` 无差异 / no `gofmt` diff
- [ ] 前端 `npm run lint` / `typecheck` / `test` 通过(如涉及 / if frontend touched)
- [ ] 已为行为变化补充或更新测试 / tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] 已更新相关文档 / docs updated if needed
- [ ] **未让 CI/CD 关键路径依赖 AI** / did not make the CI/CD critical path depend on AI
- [ ] 未提交密钥 / 凭据 / 私有数据 / no secrets, credentials, or private data committed

## 截图 / 日志(如适用) / Screenshots or logs (if applicable)
